name: Apricot Pine Nut Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a medium skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add pine nuts and cook, stirring for 2-3 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove the nuts with a slotted spoon and set aside.
3. Add rice to the skillet and cook, stirring every 3-5 minutes, until it is golden brown.
4. Stir in chicken broth and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 20 minutes or until the rice is tender and all liquid has been absorbed.
5. Return the pine nuts to the skillet. Add dried apricots and green onions. Cook, covered, over low heat for an additional 5 minutes.
